notes: Demo implements the visible generation path.
Skill already defines the complete production agent workflow.
Gold-answer evaluation and training iteration are specified as interfaces and offline workflows.
0.1.1 promotes Case_001 v3 review gaps into question wording, burden control, diary naturalness, and shopping-task naturalness rules.
0.2.0 splits respondent-facing wording rules into dg-question-wording-editor and keeps this skill focused on research logic, module planning, observation points, and wording handoff.

0.2.1 promotes AI-distilled designer rules from gold DG data: media burden, material reuse, repeated-event structure, workday/rest-day handling, brand exposure checks, sensitive numeric/rating controls, About Me drift, and module hygiene.

0.2.2 promotes reviewed Claude Opus designer rules: returning-wave profile compression, family-photo probe structure, space-module repetition control, multi-space video thresholds, repeated diary rationale, and slogan/positioning exposure checks.

0.2.3 promotes Case_005 KACO review rules: universal lifestyle and spending context, smarter module merging, object-system-first design, diary frequency judgment, habit vs one-off journey distinction, bounded innovation prompts, and photo-first media choices.

0.2.4 promotes product innovation design logic: innovation as change interpretation, concrete-to-abstract module flow, lifestyle-depth judgment, scene-need linkage, cognition and evaluation-standard decomposition, metaphor/classification probes, and bounded future opportunity design.
0.2.5 makes first-person respondent-facing module titles mandatory by default in detailed DG output, while keeping research-style names only for internal structure, module purpose, or handoff.
